content:
# Musayr Formation

**Summary**: An Early Miocene syn-rift carbonate formation in the Midyan Basin.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015]] studied the Musayr Formation to characterize its lithofacies and geochemical signatures.

## Depositional Environment

- [[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015]] syn-rift carbonate platform

## Reservoir Properties



## Key Findings Across Sources

- The formation is characterized by a variety of facies including stromatolite boundstone, oolitic grainstone, and foraminiferal packstone. ([[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015, p. 39]])

## Conflicting Interpretations Across Sources

- [[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015]] micritization, cementation, dissolution, neomorphism, dolomitization
